controlSet.description: Detect growth in behavioral proxies used to compensate for weak verification.
Flag systems that push verification cost or legibility burden onto subjects.
Flag loss of human context, ambiguity, and contestability in machine-readable processes.
Require an available verification alternative before expanding inference demands.

rules: Detect growth in behavioral proxies used to compensate for weak verification.
Flag systems that push verification cost or legibility burden onto subjects.
Flag loss of human context, ambiguity, and contestability in machine-readable processes.
Require an available verification alternative before expanding inference demands.

threats.description: Institution demands more proxy signals after inference failure.
Machine legibility strips the context needed for fair governance.
Weak proxies increase friction or exclusion for legitimate subjects.

transitions.trigger: supersession or replacement by stronger artifact

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as a legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
